subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose letter hath reached Us in the Most Great Prison. We give him glad tidings of God's tender mercy, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه فی السجن الاعظم نبشره بعنایه الله رب العالمین انا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
